data.raceName: TRANSPORT SERVICES LTD TSL PACE MS
data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. THE DANCER finished fifth last start, beaten 14 metres at Wyndham Raceway over 2400m. Talented and has plenty of upside. Likely to get all the favours from this nice draw. Has the class to take this out. 9. TREACHEROUS ME has been racing well of late. Finished fourth at her latest appearance over 1609m at this track, beaten 6 metres. Gets a soft run on the inside of the second line but may need luck at some point. Ideally placed and is sure to prove tough to beat. 12. DAME WEST is the next best after finishing runner-up over 2200m at Ascot Park Raceway last time out. 5. BEAUDIENE QUICK STEP last appeared when ninth over 2400m at this track ten weeks ago. Expect a better effort to kick off this prep.","runners":[2,9,12,5],"exclusive":false}
